name: regime_map_grid
description: Full §5 regime-map cache in the pilot-v0.2 schema.

fields.name: r_material_m
fields.description: Particle material radius used for buoyant mass.

fields.name: r_hydro_m
fields.description: Hydrodynamic radius used for Stokes drag and diffusion.

fields.name: bottom_mass_fraction
fields.description: Mass fraction in the bottom 5 % of the sample.

fields.name: used_homogeneous_short_circuit
fields.description: True when the homogeneous analytic short-circuit produced the row.

fields.name: used_equilibrated_short_circuit
fields.description: True when the equilibrated analytic short-circuit produced the row.

fields.name: used_method_c_fallback
fields.description: True when the Method-C asymptotic fallback produced the row.

fields.name: convection_flag
fields.description: Rayleigh-number side-channel flag; does not alter the regime label.
